// Fixture for test-theater rule.

describe("calculator", () => {
  it("adds numbers", () => {
    expect(true).toBe(true);
  });

  it.skip("subtracts numbers", () => {
    // never runs
  });

  it.todo("multiplies numbers");
});

describe("empty suite", () => {
  it("does work", () => {
    // no assertions at all
    const x = 1 + 1;
    return x;
  });
});
